creator: at@w-trade.spb.ru
text:
Sysinstall's fdisk can only set bootable flag on partition.
I think when set bootable flag on partition already have it
flag should be released.
Or it should possible set bootable flag only in ONE partition.
It is not so now.

How-To-Repeat: 1. Run sysinstall's fdisk
2. Set bootable flag on any partition
3. Try to release this flag or move to another partition
